goal: Menyusun ulang halaman menjadi layout terminal profesional dengan sidebar, chart toolbar, panel kanan, dan bottom tab bar.
summary: Phase 2 completed: terminal layout implemented. Added WatchlistSidebar, ChartToolbar, BottomTabBar; refactored app/page.tsx into top bar + left sidebar + center chart/bottom tabs + right signal panel; neutralized non-signal colors across 13 components; adjusted mobile bottom padding. Production build, typecheck, and lint all pass.
stepSummaries:
1. Create `components/WatchlistSidebar.tsx` showing popular + recent pairs and clicking selects symbol. [verified]
  2. Create `components/ChartToolbar.tsx` with overlay toggles (BB/EMA/FVG/OB/S/R/MS) and timeframe selector, wired to existing hooks. [verified]
  3. Create `components/BottomTabBar.tsx` dense terminal-style tab bar for Structure/Backtest/Weight Lab/History; preserve ARIA tab/tabpanel linkages. [verified]
  4. Refactor `app/page.tsx` into terminal layout: top header, left sidebar, main chart + toolbar, right signal panel, bottom tabs. Keep mobile drawer. [verified]
  5. Adjust non-signal color usage across `Header.tsx`, `KPIStrip.tsx`, `PriceChart.tsx`, `StructurePanel.tsx`, `BacktestPanel.tsx`, `IndicatorPanel.tsx`, `RiskCard.tsx`, `HistoryPanel.tsx`, `WeightLabPanel.tsx`, `Toggle.tsx`, `DemoToggle.tsx`, `IndicatorSettings.tsx`, `PairSelector.tsx` to neutral/accent tokens. [verified]
  6. Reposition `MobileSignalButton` and update page padding so it does not overlap the new bottom tab bar. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Each step had real verification: component creation used `tsc --noEmit` and grep; page refactor used `tsc --noEmit` and `eslint`; color pass used `tsc`, `eslint`, and grep; mobile padding used `tsc`, `eslint`, and grep. Additionally, `npm run build` succeeded, exercising the full Next.js compile/pagelayout/static generation pipeline.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1/2/3: typecheck passed. Step 4: typecheck + lint passed. Step 5: typecheck + lint + grep passed. Step 6: typecheck + lint + grep passed. `npm run build` succeeded (Next.js 14.2.35).

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was a terminal layout with sidebar, chart toolbar, right panel, bottom tabs, and neutral component colors. All pieces exist and are wired in app/page.tsx; the production build confirms the layout compiles and prerenders.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Files created: components/WatchlistSidebar.tsx, components/ChartToolbar.tsx, components/BottomTabBar.tsx; app/page.tsx refactored; 13 components updated for neutral colors; build output shows / route 188 kB.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in this phase. Remaining work (test/e2e updates and final visual QA) is explicitly Phase 3.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Phase 3 plan covers Playwright/a11y test updates and full suite verification.
